GPUOpen AMF SDK reference
Repository: https://github.com/GPUOpen-LibrariesAndSDKs/AMF
Commit: d0b3e6dd544a5f207bb6a12a1ecb98532491176a

The direct AMF Rust backend in `crates/ustreamer-encode/src/amf.rs` uses
hand-written FFI definitions and property constants derived from the upstream
MIT-licensed AMF SDK headers.
